fields.notes: The function writes the low byte first and the high byte second.
The byte is clamped and then written with a -0x80 transform.

notes: The packet writer zeroes the leading byte before writing the two-byte value and trailing state byte.
Observed previews stay zero-prefixed and only the last byte varies in sampled live traffic.
payloadSummary.writerPattern: zero-prefix + little-endian ushort + transformed state byte
